name: Strawberries in March
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together, except for 1 small package of jello and refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight.
2. Mold into the shape of a strawberry.
3. Roll in the remaining package of jello.
4. Make two leaves on top using icing from a can with tips or make buttercream icing and use #67 leaf tip.
5. Refrigerate. Makes approximately 80-90 servings.
NOTE: I purchase a 14 oz bag of flaked coconut and grind it finely in a food processor.
